info.name: EduConnect - All User Endpoints
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for EduConnect API.

## How to Use
1. Run **Login** in any folder — token is auto-saved to {{token}}
2. All other requests use {{token}} automatically via Collection auth
3. Pre-seeded credentials (password: password123):
   - admin@educonnect.com (ADMIN)
   - sarah.johnson@educonnect.com (TEACHER)
   - michael.chen@educonnect.com (TEACHER)
   - manager@educonnect.com (PROGRAM_MANAGER)
   - compliance@educonnect.com (COMPLIANCE_OFFICER)
   - auditor@educonnect.com (GOVERNMENT_AUDITOR)

item.name: 01 - Authentication (Public)
item.description: No token required. Login auto-saves token to {{token}} variable.

exec: console.log('✅ TEACHER token saved, userId:', res.data.userId);

item.name: 02 - Users (ADMIN only)
item.description: All endpoints require ADMIN role. Login as admin first.

item.name: 03 - Students (ADMIN, TEACHER, STUDENT)
item.description: Student profile management. Login as ADMIN to see all students.

item.name: 04 - Student Documents (STUDENT, ADMIN, COMPLIANCE_OFFICER)
item.description: Document upload and verification. Upload requires studentId.

item.name: 05 - Courses (All roles read | TEACHER, ADMIN write)
item.description: Course management. GET is open to all authenticated users. POST/PUT/DELETE requires TEACHER or ADMIN.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Advanced Data Structures",
  "description": "Deep dive into trees, graphs, heaps and dynamic programming.",
  "teacherId": {{teacherUserId}},
  "startDate": "2024-05-01",
  "endDate": "2024-10-31"
}

{
  "title": "Advanced Data Structures - Updated",
  "description": "Updated course covering trees, graphs, and algorithms.",
  "teacherId": {{teacherUserId}},
  "startDate": "2024-05-01",
  "endDate": "2024-11-30"
}

item.name: Archive Course - soft delete (TEACHER or ADMIN)
06 - Curriculum (TEACHER, ADMIN write | All read)
item.description: Course curriculum management. TopicsJson is a free-form JSON string.

item.name: 07 - Enrollments (STUDENT, ADMIN, TEACHER)
item.description: Enroll students into courses. Student must exist and course must be ACTIVE.

item.name: 08 - Content (TEACHER, ADMIN write | All read)
item.description: Digital learning content. fileUri must start with http://, https://, s3://, or /

body.raw:
{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Week 1 - Introduction Video",
  "type": "VIDEO",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/courses/intro-video.mp4",
  "description": "Introduction to the course concepts.",
  "sortOrder": 1
}

{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Week 1 - Practice Quiz",
  "type": "QUIZ",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/courses/week1-quiz.json",
  "description": "Practice quiz for week 1 concepts.",
  "sortOrder": 3
}

item.name: Track Content Access (Student accessed this content)
Archive Content - soft delete (TEACHER or ADMIN)
09 - Assessments (TEACHER, ADMIN create | STUDENT submit)
item.description: Assessments must be ACTIVE before students can submit. fileUri is optional for teacher uploads.

item.name: Create EXAM Assessment with fileUri (TEACHER or ADMIN)

body.raw:
{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Midterm Exam",
  "type": "EXAM",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/assessments/midterm-paper.pdf",
  "instructions": "Answer all 5 questions. Time allowed: 2 hours. All answers must be in English.",
  "dueDate": "2024-07-15",
  "maxScore": 100,
  "passingScore": 60
}

{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Programming Assignment 1",
  "type": "ASSIGNMENT",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/assessments/assignment1-brief.pdf",
  "instructions": "Implement the given problem using Java. Submit a ZIP file with source code.",
  "dueDate": "2024-06-30",
  "maxScore": 50,
  "passingScore": 25
}

item.name: Create QUIZ Assessment - no fileUri (TEACHER or ADMIN)

body.raw:
{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Weekly Quiz - Chapter 3",
  "type": "QUIZ",
  "instructions": "Complete the online quiz within 30 minutes.",
  "dueDate": "2024-06-10",
  "maxScore": 20,
  "passingScore": 10
}

{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Final Capstone Project",
  "type": "PROJECT",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/assessments/project-brief.pdf",
  "instructions": "Build a complete web application. Present in the last week. Submit code on GitHub.",
  "dueDate": "2024-09-30",
  "maxScore": 200,
  "passingScore": 120
}

{
  "courseId": {{courseId}},
  "title": "Midterm Exam - Updated",
  "type": "EXAM",
  "fileUri": "https://cdn.educonnect.com/assessments/midterm-paper-v2.pdf",
  "instructions": "Updated instructions. Answer all questions. Open book exam.",
  "dueDate": "2024-07-20",
  "maxScore": 100,
  "passingScore": 55
}

item.name: Activate Assessment - set ACTIVE (TEACHER or ADMIN)
10 - Submissions (STUDENT submit | TEACHER grade)
item.description: Students submit to ACTIVE assessments. Teachers grade submissions. Activate assessment first.

item.name: Get Submissions by Assessment (TEACHER or ADMIN)
12 - Notifications (All authenticated)
item.description: In-app notifications. Mark as read to clear notification badge.

item.name: 13 - Compliance (COMPLIANCE_OFFICER, GOVERNMENT_AUDITOR, ADMIN)
item.description: Login as COMPLIANCE_OFFICER or ADMIN before using these endpoints.

item.name: 14 - Reports (ADMIN, PROGRAM_MANAGER)
item.description: Login as ADMIN or PROGRAM_MANAGER before using these endpoints.
